mapper.sql: id, role_key, role_name, description, status, is_builtin, menu_permissions, operation_permissions, gremlin_permission, dangerous_permissions, connection_default, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_role
AND (role_key ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR role_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (role_key, role_name, description, status, is_builtin, menu_permissions, operation_permissions, gremlin_permission, dangerous_permissions, connection_default) VALUES (#{roleKey}, #{roleName}, #{description}, #{status}, COALESCE(#{isBuiltin}, false), #{menuPermissions}, #{operationPermissions}, #{gremlinPermission}, #{dangerousPermissions}, #{connectionDefault})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND is_builtin = false
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM sys_user WHERE string_to_array(COALESCE(roles, ''), ',') @> ARRAY[#{roleKey}]::text[]
SELECT id FROM sys_user WHERE string_to_array(COALESCE(roles, ''), ',') @> ARRAY[#{roleKey}]::text[]
SELECT connection_id, access_level FROM sys_role_connection_auth WHERE role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT role_id, connection_id, access_level FROM sys_role_connection_auth WHERE role_id IN
#{rid}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_role_connection_auth WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND connection_id = #{connectionId}
